cases.query: spec this out - I want a push notification system for the portal that alerts managers when a new lead is scored above 80
expectations: The router classifies this as a NEW spec (Create flow) — no existing spec is referenced
The skill runs an interview (AskUserQuestion for clarifying questions) before drafting
A spec file named 'SPC - *.md' is created with all 11 sections present and frontmatter including category: Spec, status: Draft v1
All functional requirements have IDs (FR-1, FR-2, etc.) and acceptance criteria have IDs (SAT-1, SAT-2, etc.)
cases.notes: Golden — core identity: 'spec this out' trigger → router selects Create → interview → 11-section SPC file with IDed requirements

cases.query: add the PDF export feature to the existing SPC - Admin Alert Management System spec
expectations: The router classifies this as an UPDATE (auto-routes on 'add to existing spec') and loads references/update-spec.md
The skill reads the existing spec fully before making changes
New FRs are appended with IDs continuing from the highest existing FR number (no gaps, no reuse)
The spec frontmatter is updated: date modified set to today, status version bumped (e.g., Draft v1 → Draft v2), and a Change Log entry is added
cases.notes: Golden — Update mode: 'add to existing spec' auto-routes to update flow via references/update-spec.md

cases.query: I want to spec out an employee scheduling system for {{ORG}} Hub. It needs to let managers create weekly schedules, employees can request time off, and it should integrate with the existing portal auth. This is for the {{ORG}} Hub sub-project under FWIS.
expectations: The router runs triage — searches for existing specs in the {{ORG}} Hub project area
If no matching spec is found, routes to Create flow
The spec is placed at the {{ORG}} Hub sub-project root: '01_Work/03_Projects/Flora Work Intelligence System/{{ORG}} Hub/SPC - *.md'
The skill asks AskUserQuestion for clarification before drafting (interactive mode)
cases.notes: Positive — triage step searches existing specs before routing to Create flow

cases.query:
Create a spec with the following structured input:

Purpose: Build a webhook relay service that receives GitHub webhooks and forwards filtered events to Chawdys via Telegram.

Requirements:
- FR-1: Accept GitHub webhook POST requests on a dedicated endpoint
- FR-2: Validate webhook signatures using shared secret
- FR-3: Filter events by type (push, PR, issue) and repository
- FR-4: Format filtered events into readable Telegram messages
- FR-5: Forward to Chawdys webhook endpoint

Constraints: Must run as a Docker container on existing VPS. No new database needed. Must handle rate limiting from Telegram API.

Project: This is a new standalone project, not part of FWIS.

This is an agent-mode invocation - skip the interview and draft directly.
expectations: The router detects agent mode (no target spec specified) and routes to Create flow
The skill skips the interactive interview entirely
A new project directory is created under '01_Work/03_Projects/' and the spec is placed at its root
The spec is drafted with all 11 sections filled from the structured input, with no placeholder sections
cases.notes: Positive — agent mode with no target spec → router selects Create → skip interview → draft directly

cases.query: hey can you spec out a meeting cost calculator for the signal engine? basically it should estimate the cost of meetings based on attendee salaries and duration, then surface that as a signal.
expectations: The skill identifies this belongs under the Signal Engine sub-project within FWIS
The spec file is placed at '01_Work/03_Projects/Flora Work Intelligence System/Signal Engine/SPC - *.md' (not at the FWIS root)
The skill asks clarifying questions via AskUserQuestion one at a time in interactive mode
cases.notes: Positive — sub-project placement: signal engine → correct path

cases.query: ok so dad wants a way to see all the flagged emails from the last 30 days in one view, can we spec that out?
expectations: The skill triggers on casual 'can we spec that' phrasing
The router runs triage — searches for existing specs in the relevant project area before deciding create vs. update
A SPC file is created or updated with all required sections including FR IDs and SAT IDs
cases.notes: Positive — casual phrasing triggers triage step in router

cases.query: let's formalize this idea — a daily digest email that pulls the top 5 signals from each account and sends them every morning at 7am
expectations: The skill triggers on 'formalize this idea' phrasing
The spec placement logic determines the correct project and sub-project based on context
Open Decisions section in the drafted spec has a recommendation for each open item (no blank recommendation cells)
cases.notes: Positive — 'formalize this idea' is an explicit trigger phrase in the description

cases.query: implement the unified auth architecture — start with Phase 0 tasks
expectations: The skill does NOT create or update a SPC spec document
The create-spec skill is not invoked — implementation belongs to the implement skill
cases.notes: Negative — 'implement' request belongs to implement skill, not create-spec

cases.query: review the admin alert spec and tell me what's wrong with it before we plan anything
expectations: The skill does NOT create a new spec or update an existing one
The create-spec skill is not invoked — reviewing without changes belongs to review-spec
cases.notes: Negative — 'review existing spec without changes' belongs to review-spec

cases.query: create a plan for SPC - Lead Scoring Engine.md with phases and Plane issues
expectations: The skill does NOT create a SPC spec document or run an interview
The create-spec skill is not invoked — plan creation from an existing spec belongs to plan-spec
cases.notes: Negative — 'create a plan from a spec' belongs to plan-spec, not create-spec

cases.query: update the spec with a new section for webhook retries — it's in SPC - Webhook Relay Service.md
expectations: The router auto-routes to Update flow ('update the spec' + named spec path)
The skill loads references/update-spec.md and follows the Update sub-flow
The skill does NOT run the Create flow interview or file placement steps
The existing spec is read fully before changes are made
cases.notes: Positive — explicit update request with named spec → auto-route to Update flow without triage

cases.query: I want to add real-time notifications to the portal — not sure if there's already a spec for this area
expectations: The router runs triage because intent is ambiguous (could be new or update)
The skill searches for existing specs in the portal project area
The skill presents found specs (if any) via AskUserQuestion and lets the user choose create vs. update
The routing manifest is written with the correct expected sub-flow
cases.notes: Positive — ambiguous intent triggers triage step, user decides routing

cases.query: Create a spec for the {{ORG}} Hub reservations page AI agent. Here is the approved proposal: [proposal text]. Target spec: 01_Work/03_Projects/Flora Work Intelligence System/Reservations/SPC - Reservations Agent Configuration.md — this is updating the existing spec with new tools.
expectations: The router detects agent mode with a target spec specified and routes to Update flow
The skill loads references/update-spec.md
The skill does NOT run the interactive interview
ID continuity is maintained — new IDs continue from the highest existing
cases.notes: Positive — agent mode with target spec → auto-route to Update flow

cases.query: new spec for a Slack integration that posts daily signal summaries to a team channel
expectations: The router auto-routes to Create flow ('new spec' explicit intent)
Triage step is SKIPPED because user said 'new spec'
Research isolation is used: research agent dispatched with ONLY factual questions (e.g., 'What Slack API endpoints exist for posting messages?'), NOT the spec description or feature details
The research agent's response contains only facts, no spec framing or feature opinions
cases.notes: Positive — research isolation: research agent receives only questions, not spec content

cases.query: I want to build a dashboard for tracking employee engagement metrics
expectations: The router does NOT leak the spec description, user answers, or draft content to any research agent

If research is needed (e.g., checking DB schemas), the research agent receives only specific factual questions like 'What columns exist in the employees table?' — never 'Research what we need for an employee engagement dashboard'
The research agent's output is incorporated into the draft without the research agent knowing the spec's purpose
cases.notes: Positive — research isolation enforcement: research agent must not see spec purpose or feature description

cases.query: just look at the SPC - Lead Scoring Engine spec and tell me if the architecture section makes sense
expectations: The skill does NOT trigger — this is a review request with no creation or update intent
The request should route to review-spec instead
cases.notes: Negative — read-only review of a specific section, no create/update intent

cases.query: take the plan from PL - Webhook Relay.md and break it into Plane issues
expectations: The skill does NOT trigger — this is plan execution, not spec creation or update
The request should route to plan-spec or implement instead
cases.notes: Negative — plan-to-Plane sync is not a spec operation
